name: Liability in Subcontractor Machine Accidents

mainEntity.name: Liable parties if subcontractor machine injures me in Cottonwood Heights?
mainEntity.text: Liable parties if subcontractor machine injures me in Cottonwood Heights?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prime contractor, subcontractor, equipment owner/manufacturer potentially liable via third-party suit beyond comp.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Complex sites share responsibility. Investigate leases/maintenance logs. Utah courts apportion fault. Cottonwood Heights construction needs multi-party expertise.[3][7]

description: Prime contractor, subcontractor, equipment owner/manufacturer potentially liable via third-party suit beyond comp.[3]
